title: postauthloginwithvalidcredentials
description: Verify that POST /auth/login with valid credentials returns 200 status and a JWT token without tenant_id initially.

title: postonboardingwithvalidjwtandorgdata
description: Verify that POST /onboarding with valid JWT and organization data returns 200 status and an updated JWT containing app_metadata.tenant_id.

title: getapicustomerswithvalidjwt
description: Verify that GET /api/customers with valid Authorization header returns 200 status and a list of customers scoped to the tenant.

title: postapicustomerswithvalidpayload
description: Verify that POST /api/customers with valid Authorization and valid customer payload returns 201 Created with new customer id.

title: postapicustomerswithinvalidpayload
description: Verify that POST /api/customers with invalid payload fails Zod validation and returns 422 Validation error.

title: postapiinventoryproductswithvalidpayload
description: Verify that POST /api/inventory/products with valid Authorization and valid product payload returns 201 Created with product id.

title: patchapiinventoryproductsidstockwithvaliddelta
description: Verify that PATCH /api/inventory/products/:id/stock with valid Authorization and stock_delta updates stock and returns 200 with updated stock level.

title: getapibillingsummarywithvalidjwt
description: Verify that GET /api/billing/summary with valid Authorization returns 200 with tenant billing summary from vw_tenant_billing_summary.
